description_long: This object is a large, flat, square slice of Swiss-style cheese, characterized by its pale yellow color and numerous round holes of varying sizes scattered across its surface and edges. The cheese has a smooth, slightly matte finish with a semi-soft appearance, and the holes penetrate through the body, giving it a distinctive, airy look. The edges are straight and clean, except for a few areas where the holes break through, creating irregular contours. The surface is mostly uniform in color, with subtle variations suggesting a natural cheese texture. There is no visible rind or outer coating, and the cheese appears to be unwrapped and unbranded. The object is placed on a neutral, flat surface with no packaging or additional context visible.
description: A large, pale yellow, square slice of Swiss-style cheese with many round holes and a smooth, semi-soft surface. The cheese has clean edges and no visible rind or packaging.
description_view_0: The cheese is seen from above, showing its flat, square shape and a dense pattern of holes across the top surface, with some holes breaking through the front edge.
description_view_1: This angled side view highlights the thickness of the cheese and the way the holes penetrate through the body, especially near the left edge.
description_view_2: A direct side view reveals the uniform thickness and the distribution of holes along the front face, with the surface texture and color clearly visible.
description_view_3: Another angled side view, similar to view 1 but from the opposite side, showing more holes near the right edge and the consistent pale yellow color.
